name: Bailey's Irish Cream Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the crushed graham crackers, melted butter, and sugar. Press into the bottom of a springform pan and bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until softened in microwave. Add egg yolks, sugar, gelatin, cocoa powder, Bailey's Irish Cream, and whipping cream.
3. Stir egg yolks into 1 cup sugar. Add to the gelatin mixture and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until thickened and bubbled. Let cool.
4. Beat cheese until light and fluffy. Add cocoa and beat again. Add Bailey's and beat more.
5. Slowly add the cooled gelatin mixture and blend well. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form. Add remaining 1/2 cup sugar and continue beating until stiff peaks form. Fold into the cheese mixture.
6. Whip cream and fold into the cheese mixture. Pour into crust and refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
